title: Brent Price
compiled_truth: Brent Price is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-07-19), Brent Price sent 40 and received 767 emails, totalling 807 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (32), [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (8), [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (4), [Fernley Dyson](people/fernley-dyson) (4), [Ted Murphy](people/ted-murphy) (4).
